[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01010100 3
3 11100000 3
4 10101100 4
5 01010010 3
6 10011011 5
7 11101101 6
